channel.title: HP Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by HP Inc. (hp).

item.title: CVE-2026-7539 · 7.3 HIGH — HP Dock Accessory WMI Provider Installer Security Update
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Accessory WMI Provider installer for some HP Docking Stations, which might allow escalation of privilege and/or arbitrary code execution. HP is releasing software updates to mitigate th…

item.title: CVE-2026-5064 · 8.5 HIGH — HP One Agent Software – Security Update
item.description: Potential security vulnerabilities have been identified in the HP One Agent for certain HP PC products, which might allow for escalation of privilege and/or denial of service. HP is releasing software updates to mitigate these potential vulnerabiliti…

item.title: CVE-2026-0826 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Poly Voice – Possible Remote Control of Certain Poly Devices
item.description: In certain scenarios when the admin has enabled Interactive Connectivity Establishment (ICE), a buffer overflow could enable remote code execution on Poly Voice products on the Linux platform.

item.title: CVE-2026-8632 · 8.5 HIGH — HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software – Potential Escalation of Privilege and Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software. This potential vulnerability may allow escalation of privileges and/or arbitrary code execution via operating system command injection.

item.title: CVE-2026-8631 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software – Potential Escalation of Privilege and Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software. This potential vulnerability may allow escalation of privileges and/or arbitrary code execution via an integer overflow in the hpcups processing pat…

item.title: CVE-2026-3291 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Samsung Print Service Plugin – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: Samsung Print Service Plugin for Android is potentially vulnerable to information disclosure when using an outdated version of the application via mobile devices. HP is releasing updates to mitigate these potential vulnerabilities.

item.title: CVE-2026-4682 · 8.7 HIGH — Certain HP DeskJet All In One (AIO) Devices – Potential Remote Code Execution & Potential Buffer Overflow
item.description: Certain HP DeskJet All in One devices may be vulnerable to remote code execution caused by a buffer overflow when specially crafted Web Services for Devices (WSD) scan requests are improperly validated and handled by the MFP. WSD Scan is a Microsoft…

item.title: CVE-2026-4667 · 7.3 HIGH — HP System Optimizer - Escalation of Privilege
item.description: HP System Optimizer might potentially be vulnerable to escalation of privilege. HP is releasing an update to mitigate this potential vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-2915 · 5.2 MEDIUM — HP System Event Utility – Denial of Service
item.description: HP System Event Utility might allow denial of service with elevated arbitrary file writes. This potential vulnerability was remediated with HP System Event Utility version 3.2.16.

item.title: CVE-2026-0754 · 8.2 HIGH — SIP Service Providers – Possible Impersonation of Poly Voice Device
item.description: An embedded test key and certificate could be extracted from a Poly Voice device using specialized reverse engineering tools. This extracted certificate could be accepted by a SIP service provider if the service provider does not perform proper valid…

item.title: CVE-2026-2832 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Certain Samsung MultiXpress Multifunction Printers Firmware – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: Certain Samsung MultiXpress Multifunction Printers may be vulnerable to information disclosure, potentially exposing address book entries and other device configuration information through specific APIs without proper authorization.

item.title: CVE-2026-1578 · 5.1 MEDIUM — HP App – Potential Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: HP App for Android is potentially vulnerable to cross-site scripting (XSS) when using an outdated version of the application via mobile devices. HP is releasing updates to mitigate these potential vulnerabilities.

item.title: CVE-2026-1997 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Certain HP OfficeJet Pro Printers - Information Disclosure
item.description: Certain HP OfficeJet Pro printers may expose information if Cross‑Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) is misconfigured, potentially allowing unauthorized web origins to access device resource. CORS is disabled by default on Pro‑class devices and can only…

item.title: CVE-2026-1996 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Certain HP OfficeJet Pro Printers – Denial of Service
item.description: Certain HP OfficeJet Pro printers may be vulnerable to potential denial of service when the IPP requests are mishandled, failing to establish a TCP connection.

item.title: CVE-2025-14432 · 8.1 HIGH — Poly Video - Sensitive Data Might Be Written to Log File
item.description: In limited scenarios, sensitive data might be written to the log file if an admin uses Microsoft Teams Admin Center (TAC) to make device configuration changes. The affected log file is visible only to users with admin credentials. This is limited to…

item.title: CVE-2025-11531 · 4.8 MEDIUM — HP System Event Utility and Omen Gaming Hub – Potential Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: HP System Event Utility and Omen Gaming Hub might allow execution of certain files outside of their restricted paths. This potential vulnerability was remediated with HP System Event Utility version 3.2.12 and Omen Gaming Hub version 1101.2511.101.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-13492 · 5.4 MEDIUM — HP Image Assistant - Potential Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in HP Image Assistant for versions prior to 5.3.3. The vulnerability could potentially allow a local attacker to escalate privileges via a race condition when installing packages.

item.title: CVE-2025-12785 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Certain HP LaserJet Pro Printers – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: Certain HP LaserJet Pro printers may be vulnerable to information disclosure leading to credential exposure by altering the scan/send destination address and/or modifying the LDAP Server.

item.title: CVE-2025-12784 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Certain HP LaserJet Pro Printers – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: Certain HP LaserJet Pro printers may be vulnerable to information disclosure leading to credential exposure by altering the scan/send destination address and/or modifying the LDAP Server.

item.title: CVE-2025-11761 · 8.5 HIGH — HP Client Management Script Library – Security Update
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Client Management Script Library software, which might allow escalation of privilege during the installation process. HP is releasing software updates to mitigate the potential vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2025-11998 · 6.8 MEDIUM — HP Card Readers (B Models) – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: The following HP Card Readers B Models (X3D03B & Y7C05B) are potentially vulnerable to information disclosure, allowing prior user identity to be inherited under certain conditions —e.g., when an NFC device (such as a smartphone/smartwatches) is in p…

item.title: CVE-2025-43017 · 8.5 HIGH — HP ThinPro 8.1 SP8 Security Updates
item.description: HP ThinPro 8.1 System management application failed to verify user's true id. HP has released HP ThinPro 8.1 SP8, which includes updates to mitigate potential vulnerabilities.

item.title: CVE-2025-43024 · 5.1 MEDIUM — HP ThinPro 8.1 SP8 Security Updates
item.description: A GUI dialog of an application allows to view what files are in the file system without proper authorization.

item.title: CVE-2025-10577 · 8.5 HIGH — Sound Research SECOMNService Escalation of Privilege
item.description: Potential vulnerabilities have been identified in the audio package for certain HP PC products using the Sound Research SECOMN64 driver, which might allow escalation of privilege. HP is releasing updated audio packages to mitigate the potential vulne…

item.title: CVE-2025-10576 · 8.5 HIGH — Sound Research SECOMNService Escalation of Privilege
item.description: Potential vulnerabilities have been identified in the audio package for certain HP PC products using the Sound Research SECOMN64 driver, which might allow escalation of privilege. HP is releasing updated audio packages to mitigate the potential vulne…

item.title: CVE-2023-6215 · 7.2 HIGH — HP Sure Start IFD Protection - BIOS Security Update
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in HP Sure Start’s protection of the Intel Flash Descriptor in certain HP PC products, which might allow security bypass, arbitrary code execution, loss of integrity or confidentiality, or denial…

item.title: CVE-2025-10578 · 5.8 MEDIUM — HP Support Assistant - Potential Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Support Assistant for versions prior to 9.47.41.0. The vulnerability could potentially allow a local attacker to escalate privileges via an arbitrary file write.

item.title: CVE-2025-10568 · 5.2 MEDIUM — HyperX NGENUITY - Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: HyperX NGENUITY software is potentially vulnerable to arbitrary code execution. HP is releasing updated software to address the potential vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2025-43491 · 7.3 HIGH — Poly Lens Desktop Application – Privilege Escalation
item.description: A vulnerability in the Poly Lens Desktop application running on the Windows platform might allow modifications to the filesystem, which might lead to SYSTEM level privileges being granted.

item.title: CVE-2025-43490 · 8.4 HIGH — HP Hotkey Support – Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HPAudioAnalytics service included in the HP Hotkey Support software, which might allow escalation of privilege. HP is releasing software updates to mitigate the potential vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2024-5477 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the System BIOS for some HP PC products which may allow escalation of privilege, arbitrary code execution, denial of service, or information disclosure via a physical attack that requires spec…

item.title: CVE-2025-43018 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Certain HP LaserJet Pro Printers – Potential Information Disclosure
item.description: Certain HP LaserJet Pro printers may be vulnerable to information disclosure when a non-authenticated user queries a device’s local address book.

item.title: CVE-2025-43023 · 5.9 MEDIUM — HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software - Use of DSA Key
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software documentation. This potential vulnerability is due to the use of a weak code signing key, Digital Signature Algorithm (DSA).

item.title: CVE-2025-3508 · 6 MEDIUM — Certain HP DesignJet products – Information disclosure
item.description: Certain HP DesignJet products may be vulnerable to information disclosure though printer's web interface allowing unauthenticated users to view sensitive print job information.

item.title: CVE-2025-43489 · 2 LOW — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The vulnerability could deserialize untrusted data without validation. HP has addressed the issue in the latest software update.

item.title: CVE-2025-43488 · 2 LOW — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.2. The vulnerability could allow a bypass of the application's XSS filter by submitting untrusted characters. HP has addressed the issue in…

item.title: CVE-2025-43487 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential privilege escalation through Sudo vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.2. The firmware flaw does not properly implement access controls. HP has addressed the issue in the latest softwar…

item.title: CVE-2025-43486 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential stored cross-site scripting vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The website allows user input to be stored and rendered without proper sanitization. HP has addressed the issue in th…

item.title: CVE-2025-43485 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.2. The vulnerability could potentially allow a privileged user to retrieve credentials from the log files. HP has addressed the issue in th…

item.title: CVE-2025-43484 · 6 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The website does not validate or sanitize the user input before rendering it in the response. HP has addressed the…

item.title: CVE-2025-43483 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The vulnerability could allow the retrieval of hardcoded cryptographic keys. HP has addressed the issue in the latest software update.

item.title: CVE-2025-43022 · 7.3 HIGH — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential SQL injection vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The vulnerability could allow a privileged user to execute SQL commands. HP has addressed the issue in the latest software update.

item.title: CVE-2025-43021 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.1. The vulnerability could allow the use and retrieval of the default password. HP has addressed the issue in the latest software update.

item.title: CVE-2025-43020 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Poly Clariti Manager - Multiple Security Vulnerabilities
item.description: A potential command injection vulnerability has been identified in the Poly Clariti Manager for versions prior to 10.12.2. The vulnerability could allow a privileged user to submit arbitrary input. HP has addressed the issue in the latest software up…

item.title: CVE-2025-43019 · 5.8 MEDIUM — HP Support Assistant – Potential Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Support Assistant, which allows a local attacker to escalate privileges via an arbitrary file deletion.

item.title: CVE-2025-43025 · 4.8 MEDIUM — HP Universal Print Driver – Potential Denial of Service
item.description: HP Universal Print Driver is potentially vulnerable to denial of service due to buffer overflow in versions of UPD 7.4 or older (e.g., v7.3.x, v7.2.x, v7.1.x, etc.).

item.title: CVE-2025-43026 · 7.1 HIGH — HP Support Assistant – Potential Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Support Assistant for versions prior to 9.44.18.0. The vulnerability could potentially allow a local attacker to escalate privileges via an arbitrary file write.

item.title: CVE-2025-1697 · 6.9 MEDIUM — HP Touchpoint Analytics Service – Potential Escalation of Privilege
item.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Touchpoint Analytics Service for certain HP PC products with versions prior to 4.2.2439. This vulnerability could potentially allow a local attacker to escalate privileges. HP is provid…

item.title: CVE-2025-2268 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HP LaserJet MFP M232-M237 Printer Series - Potential Denial of Service
item.description: The HP LaserJet MFP M232-M237 Printer Series may be vulnerable to a denial of service attack when a specially crafted request message is sent via Internet Printing Protocol (IPP).

item.title: CVE-2025-26508 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Certain HP LaserJet Pro, HP LaserJet Enterprise, HP LaserJet Managed Printers – Potential Remote Code Execution and Potential Elevation of Privilege
item.description: Certain HP LaserJet Pro, HP LaserJet Enterprise, and HP LaserJet Managed Printers may potentially be vulnerable to Remote Code Execution and Elevation of Privilege when processing a PostScript print job.
